name: Sunset Smile
description:
Welcome to your elevated escape in Sunset Golf, Marbella — a bright and spacious apartment designed around outdoor living, open views and relaxed Mediterranean comfort. Set within one of the area’s most beautifully maintained urbanisations, this home offers sweeping views of the mountains, coastline and lush surroundings, creating a peaceful yet luxurious holiday setting.

From the moment you arrive, the generous private terrace sets this property apart. Covered wooden beams provide shade while allowing natural light to filter through, creating the perfect balance between sun and comfort. The terrace has been thoughtfully designed with multiple zones, including an elegant outdoor dining area, sun loungers for long afternoons in the warmth, and a comfortable lounge corner ideal for evening drinks as the sky turns golden. A private barbecue area adds another layer of lifestyle appeal, making it easy to enjoy relaxed meals outdoors with family and friends while taking in the open views across the hills and towards the sea.

Inside, the apartment is bright, modern and welcoming. Soft neutral tones, clean finishes and natural textures create a calm atmosphere throughout. The living and dining area connects seamlessly with the terrace, allowing indoor and outdoor spaces to flow together effortlessly. The fully equipped kitchen is practical and contemporary, with generous counter space and everything needed for both short stays and longer holidays.

The bedrooms are designed for rest and comfort, featuring quality bedding, built-in wardrobes and a light, airy aesthetic. The master bedroom offers a serene retreat after a day at the beach or golf course, while the additional bedroom provides flexibility for guests or family. The bathroom is fresh and functional, finished in warm Mediterranean tones that complement the overall style of the apartment. Air conditioning and high-speed WiFi ensure comfort in every season.

Sunset Golf is known for its white Andalusian architecture, landscaped gardens and its large communal swimming pool surrounded by palm trees and greenery. The setting is quiet, secure and resort-like, yet only a short drive from Marbella’s beaches, renowned golf courses, restaurants and the vibrant atmosphere of Puerto Banús.

This apartment is ideal for guests seeking space, privacy and authentic outdoor living under the Spanish sun. Whether you are here for golf, relaxation, remote work or a family holiday, it offers the perfect combination of views, comfort and location — a true Marbella lifestyle experience.

Please note that we welcome families and couples only, no groups under 30, and no hen or stag parties. Should you fall outside of this category but wish to book nonetheless, please send us an enquiry detailing a bit more about yourself and the group that you will be travelling with so we can request this for you.

We look forward to welcoming you!
rules: No groups under 30 years of age
map_query: Sunset Smile, Estepona, Costa del Sol, Spain
